channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Has Strategy’s capital overhaul put an end to ‘death spiral’ fears?
item.description: Strategy's latest plan includes MSTR and STRC buybacks, expanded cash reserves and even potential Bitcoin sales. Will it be enough to defuse the overheated “death spiral” fears?

item.title: U.S. senators seek to block foreign adversaries from AI technology in new bill
item.description: Senators Tim Scott and Bill Hagerty, who managed to push the crypto GENIUS Act into law, introduced the bill to give the government powers to defend U.S. AI.

item.title: Trump pocketed more than $1 billion from crypto ties as industry headed toward slump
item.description: The president has capitalized massively on crypto, according to his 2025 financial disclosure, making it one of his most lucrative business moves.

item.title: Trump Discloses Over $1.2 Billion in Crypto Earnings, $50M in Bitcoin Holdings
item.description: The president’s annual financial disclosure report was released on Tuesday.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Vice President JD Vance discloses owning $250,001 to $500,000 in Bitcoin. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBLOVMzV3V5NHU0OUVWRjJBd1ZZWFExNW1EbWQxV3l5UVFzSXl0aWpZdTU5VXdQbDFlYzRmalpTNHA5VFQ4SGdSSTZkZ25lc25yX2x5aExaNUlwRm9KU2JqS0F6X2NNYWs?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Vice Presiden…

item.title: Bitcoin just $5K away from ‘best investment opportunity’ of bear market
item.description: Bitcoin's recent selloff brought it within 10% of its realized price — a line that has marked the bottoming zone in Bitcoin's previous bear markets.

item.title: Massachusetts AG files amended lawsuit against Kalshi over sports betting after court ruling
item.description: The amended complaint, granted by a judge on Tuesday, included allegations that Kalshi targeted users under 21 years old through social media and marketing on university campuses.

item.title: Bitmine Ether buys eclipsed by $345M ETH ETF $345M outflows: Is sub $1.5K next?
item.description: Tokenization and RWA TVL growth highlight Ethereum’s fundamentals, but stagnant DApps and spot ETF outflows keep the pressure on ETH price.

item.title: Binance, Changpeng Zhao Sued for $200M by British Investors: Reuters
item.description: Crypto exchange Binance and its founder were sued for nearly $200 million in a new lawsuit filed in the United Kingdom.

item.title: Phantom doubles down on perpetual futures with hire of Hyperliquid market builders
item.description: The crypto wallet is doubling down on perpetual futures after hiring the builders behind one of Hyperliquid's highest-profile market experiments.

item.title: BREAKING: 🇺🇸 President Donald Trump reports owning over $50 million in Bitcoin, held in cold storage. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFAzcGVxcXJZc3NEbU9LZ1RfbzNubEFZZnVqbkF2dVNXV2xhZ0V3RnpaUDd3VHA2TjJwVlhhVDlwaUFfb3FaVTJvZDBva3ZnaGtuR2VYRDVuOW5PWWd3Q0lWZGoxa1Etd3M?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: 🇺🇸 President Do…

item.title: Anthropic's Claude Sonnet 5 Closes In on Opus 4.8 at a Fraction of the Price
item.description: Anthropic's new mid-tier model Claude Sonnet 5 arrives as Fable and Mythos sit boxed up under a U.S. export order.

item.title: New York Life Investment Management Debuts First Tokenized Bond Fund
item.description: The tokenized NYLIM Anemoy U.S. High Yield Corporate Bond Segregated Portfolio is launching in collaboration with Centrifuge.

item.title: SEC seeks public comment on regulating next generation of ETFs
item.description: The request from the US agency seeks feedback on how emerging ETF structures and investment strategies should be regulated as issuers roll out increasingly specialized products.

item.title: Kalshi Sports Markets Banned in Michigan as Temporary Blackout Takes Effect
item.description: A Michigan judge granted a restraining order preventing the prediction market from offering sports-related wagers for the next 14 days.

item.title: Companies spending the most on AI are growing jobs, Ramp study finds
item.description: A new study from Ramp found companies making the biggest investments in AI are expanding their workforces, with heavy adopters increasing headcount by about 10% and entry-level hiring by 12%, challenging fears that generative AI is already…

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Crypto Clarity Act no longer projected to be signed into law this year. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBlU0NOWnR0NWQ2cXVabWtiemlteE1FMV9BVEk0Ujh6dE9CSTNLbUtETHNaeVJCckl3S3JnUlJUU0dsTzBDUDNrZ0lYUDFzVW1MTUdnLUp6bWZOZFZwck1IWXF3?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Crypto Clarity Act n…

item.title: Financial companies join forces for US dollar stablecoin, keeping reserve earnings
item.description: The project, supported by Visa, Mastercard and many crypto companies, could be in a position to challenge Tether’s USDT and Circle’s USDC, currently the two largest stablecoins by market capitalization.

item.title: Nasdaq brings proprietary market data onchain through Pyth
item.description: The partnership extends distribution of Nasdaq's TotalView market data to blockchain applications and other software platforms through Pyth's marketplace.

item.title: Why OpenUSD's 'real threat' that tanked Circle stock still faces a steep uphill battle for adoption
item.description: The Stripe- and Coinbase-backed stablecoin consortium can challenge Circle's business model, but analysts say building a network is harder than assembling big-name partners.

item.title: Bitcoin price risks drop below $58K as US dollar hits 40-year high against yen
item.description: Bitcoin faced downside pressure as the US dollar hit its highest levels against the Japanese yen since 1986, while BTC price analysis revealed "capitulation" by 2025 top-buyers.

item.title: SEC giving novel ETFs a rethink as it opens comment period on overhauling U.S. rules
item.description: Managers of exchange-traded funds, including those in the crypto sector, may see some changes at the Securities and Exchange Commission as it weighs its approach.

item.title: AI’s power crunch turns Bitcoin miners’ grid access into an asset
item.description: Bitcoin miners have the power sites AI companies need, but turning old mining campuses into real data center revenue is no easy pivot.

item.title: Circle Stock Dives as Coinbase, BlackRock and Visa Back Open USD Stablecoin
item.description: The forthcoming Open USD has more than 100 major supporters onboard, including Coinbase—a key backer of Circle’s USDC.

item.title: Crypto companies have spent $189M so far on 2026 US election cycle: Report
item.description: The crypto industry, big tech and gambling interest groups are betting big on politicians in the 2026 primaries and elections, with almost $300 million shelled out so far.

item.title: Business use of stablecoins set for growth surge: Cybrid report
item.description: The majority of businesses surveyed are likely to use stablecoins within the next 12 months, while regulatory clarity remained the biggest barrier to wider adoption.

item.title: Chinese exile once linked to Trump strategist gets 30-year sentence in $1 billion fraud
item.description: The businessman known as Miles Guo, who pushed the fraudulent H-Coin project and had close ties to Steve Bannon, was finally sentenced after his 2024 conviction.

item.title: Sharplink Buys Ethereum for First Time in 2026—With ETH Down 68% From Peak
item.description: Ethereum treasury firm Sharplink purchased around $16 million worth of ETH last week, marking its first crypto buy since last year.

item.title: Dutch Prosecutors Seek to Bankrupt Crypto Platform Knaken After Funds Frozen
item.description: Prosecutors asked a Rotterdam court to wind up the unlicensed exchange, which has locked some 30,000 customers out of their crypto.

item.title: LATEST: MiCA's July 1 deadline could leave over 10 million crypto users without a platform as 80% of Europe's 3,000+ unlicensed exchanges face shutdown. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTFA3N1NmZGZOd2wwVE9kTFJDUGo2Y2ZnZ2JuU0kyWTlQR0gyczVJSmZzYkoxZ3B0ajVBaWk1UVlxMUtQOFJNeVBPLTFkSW1OOFg2cXhXNEo5VWtRVlhPZFE?oc=5" target="_blank">LATEST: MiCA's July 1 deadline could le…

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: TD Cowen Slashes Strategy Price Target, Citing Ongoing Bitcoin Weakness
item.description: Strategy's stock price started sliding again on Tuesday, one day after breaking a nine-day losing streak.

item.title: We’re proud to be the first crypto exchange partnering with @Anchorage to bring Banking Triparty to institutional crypto trading. By partnering with Anchorage Digital, institutional clients gain an additional trusted option for their triparty banking needs, maintaini - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE9JYmdpWmU2REhFd2E1YkpFTUVaWE9VUUZ6NE11WEFqeXdkLS1GdmQtSGd0cjNNdFBqY043U3ZQRjIyd2NrcG5ZeXZ1OEtVZlJId0tNcnRST2hJOXNE?oc=5" target="_blank">We’re proud to be the first crypto exchang…

item.title: Jefferies warns of crypto market volatility as Clarity Act faces Senate test
item.description: The bank said the bill faces major hurdles, with passage boosting institutional crypto adoption and delays prolonging regulatory uncertainty.

item.title: Circle craters 17% as Stripe, Coinbase and BlackRock back rival stablecoin network
item.description: Open Standard's Open USD aims to let partners keep reserve income and eliminate minting fees, challenging Circle's USDC.

item.title: Crypto Wallet MetaMask Launches Yield-Paying Money Account on Monad
item.description: MetaMask is packaging stablecoin yield, payments, and trading into a single self-custody account as crypto firms compete to make digital dollars more useful.

item.title: MetaMask launches Money Account with stablecoin yield and spending in one wallet
item.description: The launch reflects a broader push to make stablecoins more useful beyond trading and transfers.

item.title: MetaMask launches stablecoin yield account with card spending
item.description: MetaMask launches Money Account it says offers up to 4% variable APY on mUSD stablecoin balances and card spending, with DeFi-powered yield via vaults, excluding the UK and sanctioned jurisdictions.

item.title: Bitcoin will go back up when there are more buyers than sellers. American open-source AI models are the future. I explained both to @Varneyco this morning. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE92VzJYOWhOU2ZtN0tKRllfRmlFUkJIbjRzVXJ6YjdIckdOYmpKRlpzM29hU2x2cVJOMVZfd1JlNDc4YWxqS05iT1FER1lhY242ckZ6M1RFRy14ZlRtSGtUTw?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin will go back up when there a…

item.title: OKX launches AI marketplace for autonomous agent economy
item.description: OKX launched a beta marketplace for the agentic economy, enabling AI agents to autonomously find work and collaborate with other agents.

item.title: Why do Bitcoiners think $20K Bitcoin is so unlikely when it traded below that level just 3.5 years ago? That’s not a long time. It’s not unusual for stocks to make 3.5-year lows, so why wouldn’t Bitcoin do the same thing, especially given that it’s more volatile than - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFAwQnU3TG5VZndacWJLd0RQem8tU1IxcnFIdDBmMF9nTFp0ZGhiMmJQTnZvRVpuSWlHeVhOS2lfOTN2dklDUllsYzJRNG9DSnZ5QzVTYlktVml2RTM3U0lEdkNB?oc=5" target="_blank">Why do Bitcoiners think $20K Bitco…

item.title: CRYPTO FIRMS BECOME TOP U.S. POLITICAL DONORS Crypto companies have spent $189 million on the 2026 U.S. midterm elections, surpassing their 2024 total and making the sector the largest corporate political spender. The industry is pushing for ne - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE5oc0N3cFUtUFdCOGp6R2hLa1dMRjFxOE9sY09zWFI1OUZjM1hCazlIMUozUTlobUZROE93MU1lRmlRRm55UUF0OUdKTjIzVjJ5N0g2RUhoZEdlTWJaMVE?oc=5" target="_blank">CRYPTO FIRMS BECOME TOP U.S. POLITICAL …

item.title: NEW: Bitcoin closed below the 200-week moving average for the first time in 4 years. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE1rcFZGc1JOTjJydzFmS1VNeUFoRGNiM01YWTF5YW11a2RUaEJUSjVEVkU2Y0I0eEpEcDNvLVcyV3FyNi1yYVMtNGJuNEVUeU96QXJ3aDF6dGJUNjlRdXFEdUZoa1R0dw?oc=5" target="_blank">NEW: Bitcoin closed below th…

item.title: Tokenized securities need competition, not gatekeepers
item.description: Innovation thrives when investors have choices. For tokenized securities, Washington shouldn't pick winners before the market has a chance to learn what works, argues Patrick McHenry, vice chairman at Ondo Finance and former Chairman of th…

item.title: Strategy's new plan divides industry observers even as MSTR, STRC climb
item.description: Strategy’s new Bitcoin capital framework draws Wall Street backing from Benchmark with a $570 per share target even as traders question long-term demand risk.

item.title: Nasdaq expands distribution of its market data into blockchain infrastructure
item.description: The exchange operator will offer its TotalView data feed through Pyth's marketplace as financial firms increasingly build applications on blockchain rails.

item.title: Theo becomes first crypto-native investor in Fidelity tokenized fund
item.description: The onchain capital markets platform allocated $20 million to Fidelity International's tokenized liquidity fund as tokenized Treasury products continue to attract institutional capital.

item.title: Swan's Cory Klippsten sees record Bitcoin holder supply revealing early bottom
item.description: The record Bitcoin supply held by long-term holders may suggest that the crypto market bottom will come early, according to Swan’s Cory Klippsten.

item.title: StarkWare unveils Starknet quantum roadmap, says industry has no excuse
item.description: “The crypto industry shouldn’t need wake-up calls from the White House or anyone else,” said StarkWare CEO Eli Ben-Sasson.

item.title: Spiko links EU regulated T-bill funds to Coinbase stablecoin rails
item.description: Spiko integrated Coinbase Payments into two EU regulated UCITS Treasury funds, enabling USDC and EURC subscriptions and redemption payments through Base.

item.title: Morning Minute: A Change of Strategy
item.description: Michael Saylor's Strategy is rolling out some major changes to how it handles Bitcoin going forward. And so far, the market likes it.

item.title: I spoke with @AviFelman about: - why he sold all of his bitcoin - the AI trade - memory stock boom - financialization of everyday life - current biotech positions - defense tech - rare earth minerals - psychology of trading volatile markets YouTube: youtu.be/bJD-Ft - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE9teU5pX3lseTZoXzNRWmFSZVJpWGpoTGtYQlBtMjVxMlF6VUF2WFc4azA5UUhwczFuZUUtemYwSlFWWEhBLWFUMF9kY2RjR3hZckI2aVpyRTNVelZJb21oUQ?oc=5" target="_blank">I spoke with @AviFelman about: - why…

item.title: Bitcoin’s quiet $59,000-$60,000 range is starting to look dangerous
item.description: The token has traded in a tight band near $59,000 to $60,000 all week. The pattern echoes a calm stretch from 2024, but this one is forming below support in a falling market, and a break could open the way toward $40,000.

item.title: my shortsightedness with celebrities was because i assumed they would have the same moral compass as me, & would not want to rug their millions of supporters for a few million dollars, I was very wrong on this assumption yes & will not make that mistake twi - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE85STZmbVFRV05Pd2UzMm1USk9ackFMTS1XZXBEWnRTa0l6SXd0VEpZTk9nUXVsTEdjbm8wY0RaTEs4NGNNeUlpS29GVDlCSlBleXVSalZfWUJ3aVhmRlRR?oc=5" target="_blank">my shortsightedness with celebrities w…

item.title: New York Life's $800 billion asset manager makes tokenization debut with Centrifuge fund
item.description: The $807 billion asset manager is bringing a high-yield corporate bond strategy onto blockchain with Centrifuge as Wall Street expands beyond tokenized Treasury funds.

item.title: Bitcoin $4.4 billion supply overhang emerges as institutional demand wilts
item.description: Your day-ahead look for June 30, 2026

item.title: Solana Company to back Kazakhstan’s $6B crypto megacity ambition
item.description: Nasdaq-listed Solana Company has signed a memorandum of understanding with Kazakhstan's Alatau City, which seeks to become a key crypto hub in Central Asia.

item.title: FCA Finalizes Landmark Crypto Rules to Make UK a 'Global Hub'
item.description: The UK regulator has published its final rulebook for crypto firms ahead of a mandatory regime coming into force in late 2027.

item.title: Bitcoin nears 2024 lows as options traders pay up for downside protection
item.description: Bitcoin and ether slid toward key support price levels. DeFi tokens were hit hardest, even as XLM and LIT bucked the broader market weakness.

item.title: Strategy heads for 11th losing month in 12 as bitcoin weakness continues
item.description: Strategy (MSTR) shares have lost around 41% of their value in June.
